fields.description:
## Context / Problem
Under Mypy 2.3.0, no_implicit_optional emits zero diagnostics and strict_equality emits zero diagnostics across src/rebar. The empirical command .venv/bin/python -m mypy src/rebar --warn-redundant-casts --no-error-summary --show-error-codes exits 1 with exactly one diagnostic: src/rebar/llm/workflow/editor.py:515: error: Redundant cast to "int" [redundant-cast]. The file contains two cast() calls at lines 514-515; the str cast at line 514 is not diagnosed. warn_unused_ignores reports 23 diagnostics across 19 source files. Because unused-ignore results can change with Mypy, Python, dependency stubs, and optional extras, cleanup must be performed only in the pinned, fully provisioned CI environment.

## Approach
1. Depend on the approved dependency-freezing work to pin the canonical Mypy version and provision all project extras used by CI.
2. Add a failing ratchet test that requires no_implicit_optional, strict_equality, warn_redundant_casts, and warn_unused_ignores while explicitly preserving the deferral of disallow_any_generics and disallow_untyped_defs.
3. Capture the standalone diagnostic output in the canonical environment.
4. Remove the int cast at editor.py:515 after the command above proves it redundant. Retain the adjacent str cast unless Mypy independently diagnoses it.
5. Inspect the suppressed error and relevant optional-dependency environment for each of the 23 unused-ignore diagnostics. Remove an ignore only when the canonical fully provisioned environment proves it stale; otherwise preserve it and narrow or document configuration.
6. Enable the four approved global settings and run the exact verification commands below.

Rejected: enabling disallow_any_generics or disallow_untyped_defs. Rejected: deleting ignores solely from output produced by an incompletely provisioned environment.

## Scope
Configuration and ratchet:
- pyproject.toml
- tests/unit/test_mypy_ratchet.py

Redundant-cast inspection:
- src/rebar/llm/workflow/editor.py:514-515

The 23 observed warn_unused_ignores diagnostics:
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/outbound_comments.py:60
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_fields.py:42
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_differ.py:68
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/differ.py:37,77
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/apply_base.py:39
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile_check.py:37
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/binding_store.py:228
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py:36
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/_ref_lock.py:86
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile_helpers.py:44
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/invariants.py:213
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/acli.py:464
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/run_differs.py:46
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/rebar_id_audit.py:48
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/_advisory_lock.py:51
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/outbound_fields.py:48
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_translate.py:151,311
- src/rebar/__main__.py:70,102
- src/rebar/llm/workflow/schema.py:86,100

Line numbers identify the observed Mypy 2.3.0 baseline. Newly surfaced diagnostics are recorded as discovered work rather than silently expanding this story.

## Testing / Verification
- Configuration: pytest -q tests/unit/test_mypy_ratchet.py
- Standalone Mypy: mypy src/rebar --warn-redundant-casts
- Standalone Mypy: mypy src/rebar --warn-unused-ignores
- Canonical type gate: make typecheck
- Behavior-adjacent tests: pytest -q tests/unit/workflow/test_editor.py tests/unit/workflow/test_schema.py tests/interfaces/facades/test_cli.py tests/unit/rebar_reconciler
- Default tier: pytest -m "not integration and not external" -q

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/unit/test_mypy_ratchet.py asserts no_implicit_optional, strict_equality, warn_redundant_casts, and warn_unused_ignores are enabled globally.
- [ ] Before remediation, the exact Mypy 2.3.0 redundant-cast command and its single editor.py:515 diagnostic are recorded in a ticket comment.
- [ ] mypy src/rebar --warn-redundant-casts exits 0 after remediation.
- [ ] mypy src/rebar --warn-unused-ignores exits 0 after remediation.
- [ ] make typecheck exits 0.
- [ ] A ticket comment maps each of the 23 baseline unused-ignore diagnostics to removed, preserved-and-narrowed, or preserved-and-documented.
- [ ] The editor diff removes the diagnosed int cast and retains the adjacent str cast unless a new recorded Mypy diagnostic proves it redundant.
- [ ] tests/unit/test_mypy_ratchet.py asserts disallow_any_generics and disallow_untyped_defs are not enabled globally.
- [ ] pytest -q tests/unit/workflow/test_editor.py tests/unit/workflow/test_schema.py tests/interfaces/facades/test_cli.py tests/unit/rebar_reconciler exits 0.
- [ ] pytest -m "not integration and not external" -q exits 0.
